notes: Sector Code. Every galaxy now has a short, shareable code - one code recreates the exact same frontier ring and lane graph, hazards and hyperlanes included. Find it on the Galaxy tab or via the new 🔑 Seed button, which can also start a new game from any code (yours or a friend's). Also fixes a bug where starting a New Game mid-session (rather than reloading the page) could leave the previous run's frontier worlds stranded and unreachable.
